---

Okay, so it's 24 hours after you make contact. This is what you're going to do today. I want you to call the client and tell them I had an idea and I'd like a time to meet. That's right. I have an idea about something that would benefit you and I'd like a time to meet either tomorrow or the next day. Give them a choice, get them to commit and ask for a personal visit. Now, if they're out of your area, I want you to set up a time to do a go-to meeting and or Skype conference call so you would go like this. I had an idea and I'd like a time over tomorrow or the next day or even today. I'll find time for you today a time we can do a video conference call. Try that now. And if you don't know what to do tomorrow, check back in with me.
